arts.ttl: Man City send Chelsea 'next Cole Palmer' deadline day transfer message as secret clause revealed
arts.sum: Indeed, according to our colleagues at The Manchester Evening News, Chelsea recently approached City regarding O'Reilly's availability. O'Reilly only made his Premier League debut for Manchester City last month, coming off the subs bench in a 6-0 win over Ipswich Town at Portman Road.

arts.ttl: Christopher Nkunku transfer latest as Man United outline risky Chelsea plan
arts.sum: According to Fabrizio Romano on his YouTube channel, Manchester United remain interested in signing Nkunku, but the Frenchman doesn't want to leave Chelsea on loan. Last month, football.london reported that Bayern Munich were interested in signing Nkunku .

arts.ttl: Chelsea make major Joao Felix transfer demand amid Aston Villa interest and loan option
arts.sum: Chelsea are willing to let Joao Felix leave in a permanent deal on transfer deadline day amid interest from Aston Villa, football.london understands. Aston Villa have been one of the interested clubs, but while football.london understands that they would consider a move for the 25-year-old, they have no interest in paying a fee of over £60million.

arts.ttl: Chelsea stance on Christopher Nkunku transfer revealed amid Manchester United bid
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku is set to stay at Chelsea for the rest of the season, despite renewed interest from Manchester United, football.london understands. football.london understands United tabled a bid to sign the Frenchman on loan for the rest of the season on deadline day and that that offer was rejected by Chelsea .

arts.ttl: Every Chelsea deadline day transfer that can be completed with Alejandro Garnacho and Joao Felix
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho: Chelsea remain interested in Alejandro Garnacho, football.london understands, and a move on deadline day is by no means out of the equation at the time of writing. So, with that being said, football.london has looked at what business Chelsea could wrap up before the 11pm deadline.

arts.ttl: Chelsea stance over Alejandro Garnacho transfer deadline day move as two deals completed
arts.sum: Chelsea remain interested in Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho, football.london understands, and a move on deadline day is by no means out of the equation at the time of writing. Chelsea were interested in Bayern Munich youngster Mathys Tel but a deal was too complicated for the west Londoners to pull off in the end - meaning there is a possibility the club revisit the Garnacho situation.

arts.ttl: AC Milan submit deadline day offer for Chelsea forward
arts.sum: AC Milan have submitted a formal proposal to sign Joao Felix on loan from Chelsea. Felix is exploring his options after struggling for a regular role since re-joining Chelsea in the summer. The Portugal international signed from Atletico Madrid in a £45m deal but has started just three times in the Premier League. 🔴⚫️ Joao […] The post AC Milan submit deadline day offer for Chelsea forward first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Caleb Wiley completes loan switch to Championship promotion contender
arts.sum: Chelsea allow one of the young prospects to complete a loan switch to a Championship promotion contender on transfer deadline day.

arts.ttl: West Ham sign Evan Ferguson on loan - no option to buy Brighton striker included in deal
arts.sum: West Ham confirmed the signing of Evan Ferguson on Monday, as the Brighton striker made the move to London on a loan deal for the remainder of the season. According to Sky Sports, the...

arts.ttl: “Not ruled out” | ExWHUEmployee | Daniel Cummings to West Ham update
arts.sum: West Ham haven’t ruled out trying to secure a deal for Daniel Cummings today, despite a rejection from Celtic again. Although West Ham have a pre-contract in place for the striker this summer, the club were eager to secure the move sooner by offering additional funds to enable the move from Celtic during this transfer...
